PEP: 404
Title: Python 2.8 Un-release Schedule
Author: Barry Warsaw
Status: Final
Type: Informational
Created: 09-Nov-2011
Resolution: https://mail.python.org/pipermail/python-dev/2011-November/114625.html

Abstract
========

This document describes the un-release schedule for Python 2.8. No
Python 2.8 release will be made.

Motivation
==========

The PEP assumes that Python 3 adoption will be faster if there is no
Python 2.8 to fall back on. This proposal requires tooling vendors
to commit to Python 3 support.
